name: How long does it take to see results from answer engine optimization?
description: 2-8 weeks with fresh content; faster locally.[2][3]

mainEntity.name: How long does it take to see results from answer engine optimization?

acceptedAnswer.text: 2-8 weeks with fresh content; faster locally.[2][3]
acceptedAnswer.description: **GEO results appear in 2-8 weeks as AI indexes fresh, authoritative content.**[2] Crawl times vary by tool, but consistent updates accelerate visibility.[3] **Key factors:** 1. AI favors recent, unique insights.[3] 2. 6X-7X ROI reported in months.[2] 3. Local tweaks (e.g., Houston courts) speed local wins. **Publish weekly, track citations in Perplexity, refine based on gaps.** Delays mean competitors surge ahead.[9]
